title: merathrepta americana
side_effects: Merathrepta americana can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing allergic reactions, skin irritation, and respiratory issues in some individuals. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can lead to nausea, vomiting, and abdominal pain. In severe cases, improper use of the plant may result in liver and kidney damage, as well as an increased risk of seizures and coma. It is essential to exercise extreme caution when handling and using Merathrepta americana, as its benefits are outweighed by its potential risks if not used correctly.
